title: Restore CKC fuzzy, vector, combination search and rich tags
operator_request: Original CKC had fuzzy search, vector search, combination search, rich tags, and a notes system for images and tags.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: Inspect existing search/vector/tag infrastructure before adding new search stacks.

scope.summary: Make CKC searchable across characters, media, albums, notes, and tags with fuzzy/vector/combined modes.
base_scope: Audit existing Handshake search, vector, and tag primitives.
Implement CKC fuzzy search over character/media/tag fields.
Implement or wire vector search using existing Handshake vector/index systems.
Implement combination search that can intersect text, vector, tags, and character/media constraints.
Expose rich tags and tag notes without collapsing them into character notes.
Update internal UserManual with search modes and expected inputs/outputs.
acceptance_criteria: CKC exposes fuzzy, vector, and combined search modes.
Search results can cite stable CKC character/media/tag refs.
Rich tags and tag notes round-trip.
Argus can inspect and steer the search controls.
verification: Backend tests for fuzzy/vector/combined search behavior.
Native UI tests for search controls and result rows.
